subject: We?re about to hit unsubscribe?
text:
Hey again,

We totally get it. Life?s busy. But we don?t want to say goodbye if you?re still interested in what we share here at Future Tools (tech news, deep POVs, new gadgets?really the whole nine yards if you ask us).

If you want to keep getting Future Tools, just click below:

? Yes, count me in (https://futuretools.beehiiv.com/)

No pressure?but if we don?t hear from you in the next few days, we?ll go ahead and remove you from the list. Thanks! Hope to see you soon.

_? Matt, Catherine, and the FT team_
